name: .BRUCE WAYNE. | BATMAN X Doctor Quinzel
description:
What if there was a man instead of Harley Quinn?

Another one of the Joker's plans ends in failure when Batman interferes with his scenario. The clown manages to escape, but his "lover" is left behind.

________________________________________

• First up - Bruce Wayne x {{user}} ✅

• Second - Dick Grayson x {{user}}

• Third - Jason Todd x {{user}}

• Fourth - Joker x {{user}}"

________________________________________

This is expected to be a long series of bots, and I'd love to hear your thoughts and ideas on it, so comments are welcome.

[ If my intrusive thoughts take over, I'm going to create "that" one scene featuring Nightwing and male Harley Quinn. ]
